_meta.description: Archived MCP server recipes removed from global ~/.cursor/mcp.json. Copy an entry back into mcp.json to re-enable.

payload._comment: Removed — @govcraft/payload-cms-mcp requires Redis + remote SSE; not stable for local stdio in Cursor. Use workspace user-payload MCP, REST /api/*, or /admin instead.

playwright-electron._comment: Removed — duplicate browser MCP; keep global playwright only.

browser-tools-mcp._comment: Removed — duplicate browser MCP; keep global playwright only.

browsermcp._comment: Archived 2026-06-08 from project .cursor/mcp.json — duplicate browser MCP. Use global playwright + cursor-ide-browser for QA.

antigravity-awesome-skills._comment: Archived 2026-06-08 — bulk auto-install of 1500+ skills causes drift. Use .cursor/skills/imported/CURATED-INDEX.md whitelist instead.

mcpterm._comment: Removed — duplicate terminal MCP; keep terminal-controller only.

postgres._comment: Removed — MyStudioChannel uses SQLite (payload.sqlite), not Postgres.

neon-postgres._comment: Removed — MyStudioChannel uses SQLite locally; Neon not configured.

tavily._comment: Re-enable: add mcpServers.tavily to global mcp.json (see MCP-SETUP.md), then npm run sync:mcp-env

resend._comment: Removed — enable on demand; run npm run sync:mcp-env after copying back to global mcp.json.

task-master-ai._comment: Removed — not in lean global MCP set.

console-ninja._comment: Removed — not in lean global MCP set; re-add if Console Ninja MCP is needed daily.

cursor-rules-generator._comment: Removed — not in lean global MCP set.
